title: taraxacum pubescens
intro: Taraxacum pubescens, also known as the hairy dandelion or downy dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and support liver health. The health benefits of Taraxacum pubescens include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum pubescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
